_README: TEMPLATE ONLY — DO NOT COPY THESE NUMBERS BLINDLY. Every printer is different: nozzle wear, firmware (Marlin vs Klipper), extruder type, and especially temps/z-offset must be calibrated on YOUR machine. Copy this file to '<your-printer>.json' (which .gitignore keeps out of git), then fill in REAL values from your own calibration. Wrong temps/start-gcode can damage the printer or cause failed prints.
name: REPLACE — e.g. Creality CR-10 Smart
source: REPLACE — where these numbers came from (your calibration notes)

machine.auto_bed_leveling: REPLACE — e.g. CR Touch / manual / none

firmware_quirks.note: REPLACE — firmware-specific gotchas. Example: Klipper rejects Marlin-only M201/M203/M205.
firmware_quirks.bed_leveling_command: REPLACE — e.g. G29  or  BED_MESH_PROFILE LOAD=default

start_gcode:
; REPLACE with YOUR calibrated start G-code.
; Placeholders {nozzle_temp_0} and {bed_temp_0} are substituted at slice time.
G28
G92 E0
end_gcode:
; REPLACE with YOUR end G-code.
M104 S0
M140 S0
M84

REPLACE-material-id.name: REPLACE — e.g. Generic PLA (calibrate before trusting)
